{{Infobox Object|List={{{1|}}}|GetValue={{{GetValue|}}} | name = Plate Armor | article = a | actualname = plate armor | plural = ? | itemid = 3357 | objectclass = Body Equipment | primarytype = Armors | slot = Body | sounds = {{Sound List|}} | implemented = 3.0 | immobile = no | walkable = yes | pickupable = yes | upgradeclass = 1 | armor = 10 | weight = 120.00 | stackable = no | marketable = yes | droppedby = {{Dropped By|Ancient Lion Knight|Ancient Scarab|Behemoth|Black Knight|Bonebeast|Brutus Bloodbeard|Crystal Spider|Cursed Ape|Deadeye Devious|Destroyer|Dreadbeast|Giant Spider|Giant Spider (Nostalgia)|Hairman the Huge|High Templar Cobrass|Kongra|Lethal Lissy|Lizard Templar|Loricate Orger|Lucifuga Aranea|Memory of a Pirate|Memory of a Scarab|Naga Warrior|Orc Cult Fanatic|Orc Leader|Orc Warlord|Pirate Buccaneer|Quara Pincher Scout|Ron the Ripper|Sacred Spider|The Snapper|Undead Elite Gladiator|Undead Gladiator|Valkyrie|Warlord Ruzad}} | value = 400 - 800 | npcvalue = 400 | npcprice = 1200 | npcvaluerook = 0 | npcpricerook = 0 | buyfrom = Azil, Baltim, Brengus, Cedrik, Cornelia, Esrik, Flint, Hardek, Kroox, Memech, Morpel, Robert, Rock In A Hard Place, Sam, Shanar, Turvy, Ulrik, Willard, Yanni | sellto = Azil, Baltim, Brengus, Cedrik, Cornelia, Esrik, Flint, H.L.: 110, Hardek, Kroox, Memech, Morpel, Robert, Rock In A Hard Place, Sam, Shanar, Turvy, Ulrik, Willard, Yanni | notes = This armor is used by mostly all players in lower levels, because it's easy to get and provides good defense. It is the next armor to get after [[Scale Armor]].
For a mage, the more suitable armor with same defense is a [[Mammoth Fur Cape]]. [[Knight]]s should save for a [[Noble Armor|noble]] or [[Knight Armor|knight armor]]. [[Paladin]]s should buy a [[Belted Cape]] which has the same defense but is much lighter. This can also be gotten by [[Rust Remover|unrusting]] a [[Heavily Rusted Armor]], [[Rusted Armor]] or [[Slightly Rusted Armor]]. Can be obtained in the [[Plate Armor Quest]]. }}
